name: python3-pycares
title: python3-pycares
description:
Python interface for c-ares (Python 3)
pycares is a Python module which provides an interface to c-ares. c-ares is
a C library that performs DNS requests and name resolutions asynchronously.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pycares because Python interface for c-ares (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pycares as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pycares with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pycares --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
